picks.analysis: PLTR scores +22 — a Strong Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Fundamentals (+8), reinforced by Technicals (+7). The biggest contributors are 100D SMA (+3, +6.3%), Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Guidance (+2, +95.1%). Cutting the other way: 20D S/R (-1, ±0.8% to R), Unusual Flow (-1, 2C / 6P prints). Within Technology we gave PLTR a +22 and DELL a +20 — same direction, lower conviction — which is why we'd take PLTR calls over DELL calls, mainly on Technicals (+7 vs +3) and Fundamentals (+8 vs +7). The suggested calls sit ~15.0% OTM with 48d to expiry, delta 0.29, mid $5.05 — well inside the 5-30% OTM / Δ 0.20-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.

reasons.technical: round number $370.00 at $370.00 (-4.0%) — the first crack below spot. Losing it on volume warns the cut is next; reduce rather than hope.
reasons.mechanical: Watch for a put-volume spike or fresh put open interest here — smart money hedging ahead of the break.

levels.watchFor: Loses it on volume → the cut at $354.56 is next; tighten up.

reasons.technical: A daily close below $354.56 (-8.0%) breaks the structure driving the call — the chart says the move is over. Don't hold a long call under broken support.
reasons.fundamental: A guidance cut or a macro risk-off rotation is what usually drives price here — exit, don't average down.
reasons.mechanical: A surge in put buying / put-call pushing back above ~1.25 confirms the turn.
reasons.narrative: If "AI Infrastructure Buildout" flips against the trade, the reason for the position is gone — exit on the narrative, not the chart.

levels.prose: A close below round number $350.00 breaks the structure the trade is built on.
levels.proseAi: Cut if a daily close below $354.56 breaks structure, indicating a fundamental or macro shift.

triggers: Time stop: don't carry into the final week before Jul 16 '26 — theta accelerates and the breakeven move gets harder each day.
Thesis check: if a higher-scoring setup appears or the original reason for the trade stops being true, rotate out regardless of price.
exitPlan.overviewAi: Take profits at key resistance levels, trim on strength, and cut losses if support breaks decisively.

picks.analysis: CLS scores +20 — a Strong Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Fundamentals (+6), reinforced by Technicals (+6). The biggest contributors are 100D SMA (+3, +19.4%), Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Guidance (+2, +70.1%). Cutting the other way: Net Margin Growth (-1, 5.2%), MACD (-1, -1.70). Within Technology, the next-closest same-direction peer is SMCI at +25 — well below CLS's +20, so CLS is the cleaner calls expression. The suggested calls sit ~14.2% OTM with 48d to expiry, delta 0.36, mid $20.75 — well inside the 5-30% OTM / Δ 0.20-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.
